message:
fix(polyfills): fix native polyfill vs Node.js registration gaps

- Guard TTY classes in zlib.js with typeof check to prevent parse errors
- Register buffer module at _modules.buffer (not just _nativeBuffer)
- Add 4 missing polyfills to native_main_static.zig (require, querystring, globals, string_decoder)
- Add process.argv and CWD handling to native_main_static.zig
- Fix require.zig createUtilModule to use native util first
